title: ligularia duciformis
intro: Ligularia duciformis, also known as golden ray, is a perennial plant native to China and Japan, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and dark green, ovate-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The health benefits of Ligularia duciformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
